text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm passing by the dorms...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! I'm okay, Flower. It's not bad enough that I need to take the day off.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... if you push yourself any more, you'll
collapse from exhaustion!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Creek's caught a cold, but she doesn't want to
rest. She says she still has things to do...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Laundry, vacuuming, bedtime stories... Everyone
needs me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I have to be there for them...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Creek...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You can leave all of that to me! I'll look after
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But... but that means I won't get to pamper... No,
I mean—I would hate to cause you trouble,
Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, it's no trouble at all! I want to help!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I wish I could look after them myself... but
okay.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Knowing you, I'm sure you'll be a great mommy
for everyone.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll try my best!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oguri, hi! I'm here to deliver your lunch box on
Creek's behalf.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Did you... arrange the food to look like me?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Creek suggested I make something you can
have fun eating. I jam-packed it with all your
favorite foods! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I see. Thank you. Hehe, it's very cute.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Taishin, your training partner has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? Didn't Creek leave school early today?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's why I'm here to run with you instead! I
can hold my own up to medium
distance—promise!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A-all right, all right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Ya really don't gotta do this, y'know...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. I'm here in Creek's stead! I'll
massage all your fatigue away!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Whew! Thanks a bunch. You're real considerate,
aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, Creek told me to give you a thorough
massage after training.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
And then after that, I think she said... to give you
a pat on the head for good measure?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: The heck ya will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Nishino Flower's day of being a mommy
comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... That was more tiring than I expected.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Creek is amazing. She helps out so many people.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
She was there for me too, when I first arrived at
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I was feeling lonely, but she told me I could rely
on her as if she were my own mother. It was so
reassuring.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to be just as reliable as she is one day.
choice_data_list: It's easy to see your heart's in it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I want to be just as reliable as she is one day.
choice_data_list: It's easy to see your heart's in it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
My approach was probably different from
Creek's... but I hope the others found it just as
helpful. ♪
choice_data_list: You should have more confidence in yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Okay!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, and um... I did something for you too...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
This is a potpourri that I made, full of scents to
relieve fatigue. If you'd like, it's yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, I'm able to enjoy a productive
work session thanks to the potpourri Nishino
Flower gave me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I hope so! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
By the way, are you free? I brought some
homegrown tea leaves with me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I was wondering if you'd like to try them.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tea Nishino Flower brews for me is delicious.
Her gratitude toward me for accompanying her
today is apparent in every sip.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! After today, I feel like I've gotten a
little closer to getting there.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
When I grow up, I want to be just as kind and
dependable as Creek! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: There, there. Mommy's here for you, honey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm here too! So... just relax and let us spoil you,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, is something wrong?
choice_data_list: It's nothing. Just... don't go overboard, all right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks for the advice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That sudden fever dream... Could it have been a
sign of things to come?
